message:
test(e2e): add full init-to-run pipeline tests, registry integrity tests, and actionable error coverage

Trust CLI E2E tests (bd-3s2x8):
- Three full-pipeline E2E tests: empty registry warning, trusted extension
  happy path, revoked extension strict block
- Infrastructure: tracing init, pipeline helpers, package manifest/lockfile
  writers, workspace diagnostics, failure panic helpers
- Actionable error output verification: missing registry suggests init,
  blocked preflight suggests trust list, missing runtime shows fix_command
  and help URLs, revoked trust shows fix_command, missing signing key
  shows fix_command

Registry CLI E2E tests (bd-1mdlj):
- registry_publish_persists_artifact_and_search_reports_integrity
- registry_verify_detects_corrupted_local_artifact
- registry_search_reports_hash_mismatch_for_corrupted_local_artifact
- registry_verify_detects_tampered_manifest_signature
- registry_gc_archives_older_lineage_entries
- New helpers for artifact/manifest path inspection and tampering

Incident CLI E2E tests (bd-3cnmb):
- incident_bundle_receipt_export_fails_when_signing_key_missing verifying
  ActionableError output format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
